text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 276 

TANF_CASH_CD 

LABEL: Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF) Cash Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag that indicates whether the beneficiary received Federal Temporary Assistance for Needy 
Families (TANF) benefits; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: TANF_CASH_CD 

LONG NAME: TANF_CASH_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE
